case_title: KIMBERLY WARD-COX VS. BARRY S. WARD et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT WARD, BARRY S.
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD-COX, KIMBERLY ATTORNEY-IN-FACT FOR ANDERSON D. WARD JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-02-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY WARD-COX'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY FOR DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED AS OF JULY 15, 2010. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS BY JULY 27, 2010 PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE SECTION 1170.8, WHICH PROVIDES FOR AN EXPEDITED HEARING OF DISCOVERY MATTERS IN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTIONS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $790, TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF BY AUGUST 31, 2010. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE DONALD SULLIVAN. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Kimberly Ward-Cox is present.
Attorney, Michael Hall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Barry Ward, is present.
Attorney, Nathanael Player , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-02-2010 is vacated.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery From Deft And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: FRANCISCO GUTIERREZ, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party. No other appearance stated.

PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY WARD-COX's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery for Defendant is granted. No opposition has been filed as of July 15, 2010. Defendant's failure to respond to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production is a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's discovery requests by July 27, 2010 pursuant to California Civil Code Section 1170.8, which provides for an expedited hearing of discovery matters in unlawful detainer actions. Sanctions are awarded in favor of plaintiff and against Defendant in the amount of $790, to be paid by Defendant to Plaintiff by August 31, 2010. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BARRY WARD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON 6/14. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 (301/PJB)
